languages.text: "Как и я закрою глаза на угрозы, что нависли над протекторатом в отсутствие зоркого присмотра за оным".
"Likewise, I shall turn a blind eye to the threats looming over the protectorate as a result of a lack of vigilant oversight."
languages.original_text: "Как и я закрою глаза на угрозы, что нависли над протекторатом в отсутствие зоркого присмотра за оным".

traits.locale_text: "Likewise, I will turn a blind eye to the threats looming before the protectorate due to its lack of vigilant oversight."
"Likewise, I will turn a blind eye to the threats looming before the protectorate due to its lack of vigilant oversight."
"Likewise, I shall turn a blind eye to the threats looming over the protectorate as a result of a lack of vigilant oversight."
"Likewise, I shall turn a blind eye to the threats looming over the protectorate as a result of a lack of vigilant oversight."
"Likewise, I shall turn a blind eye to the threats looming over the protectorate as a result of a lack of vigilant oversight."

languages.text: "Gleichzeitig werde ich angesichts der Gefahren, die dem Protektorat aufgrund eines Mangels an wachsamer Aufsicht drohen, eine Auge zudrücken."
languages.original_text: "Likewise, I shall turn a blind eye to the threats looming over the protectorate as a result of a lack of vigilant oversight."

traits.locale_text: "Gleichzeitig werde ich angesichts der Gefahren, die dem Protektorat aufgrund eines Mangels an wachsamer Aufsicht drohen, eine Auge zudrücken."

languages.text: « Je vais également ignorer les menaces qui pèsent sur le protectorat suite à un terrible manque de vigilance. »
languages.original_text: "Likewise, I shall turn a blind eye to the threats looming over the protectorate as a result of a lack of vigilant oversight."

traits.locale_text: « Je vais également ignorer les menaces qui pèsent sur le protectorat suite à un terrible manque de vigilance. »

languages.text: «Del mismo modo, ignoraré las amenazas que acechan al protectorado como resultado de una falta de vigilancia».
languages.original_text: "Likewise, I shall turn a blind eye to the threats looming over the protectorate as a result of a lack of vigilant oversight."

traits.locale_text: «Del mismo modo, ignoraré las amenazas que acechan al protectorado como resultado de una falta de vigilancia».

languages.text: "Aynı şekilde ben de dikkatli bir gözetim eksikliği nedeniyle protektorada beliren tehditleri görmezden geleceğim."
languages.original_text: "Likewise, I shall turn a blind eye to the threats looming over the protectorate as a result of a lack of vigilant oversight."

traits.locale_text: "Aynı şekilde ben de dikkatli bir gözetim eksikliği nedeniyle protektorada beliren tehditleri görmezden geleceğim."

languages.text: “同样的，对于那些因监管不力而笼罩在属地上的威胁，我也会视而不见。”
languages.original_text: "Likewise, I shall turn a blind eye to the threats looming over the protectorate as a result of a lack of vigilant oversight."

traits.locale_text: “同样的，对于那些因监管不力而笼罩在属地上的威胁，我也会视而不见。”

languages.text: 「同様に、私は、監視の怠慢によって保護領に迫っている脅威を、見逃すことにする。」
languages.original_text: "Likewise, I shall turn a blind eye to the threats looming over the protectorate as a result of a lack of vigilant oversight."

traits.locale_text: 「同様に、私は、監視の怠慢によって保護領に迫っている脅威を、見逃すことにする。」
